title: Non-Sentient Professional Greenputt Tour
content:

{{Quote|With the confirmation and certification of consistent game-play skills of three Ambrian neeks and a Taurill named Bortis, the Greenputt Governing Council today announced the formation of the Non-Sentient Professional Greenputt Tour (NSPGT).|HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN" />}}
The '''Non-Sentient Professional Greenputt Tour''' was one of the major leagues for [[greenputt]], a ball game<ref name="Ballgame">{{SW|url=news/take-me-out-to-the-ballgame-sports-in-the-star-wars-galaxy-part-2|series=Sports in the Star Wars Galaxy|text=Part 2: Take Me Out to the Ball Game|nolive=1}}</ref> played on a field.<ref name="Twilight">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref> It was formed in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="Date" /> by the [[Greenputt Governing Council]] after the council certified the consistency of the game-play skills of the [[Taurill/Legends|Taurill]] [[Bortis]] and three [[Ambria/Legends|Ambrian]] [[Neek (creature)|neek]]s.<ref name="HNN" />

Despite its official classification as [[Sentience/Legends|semi-sentient]]<ref name="EGAS">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref> and inclusion in the "Non-Sentient" league,<ref name="HNN" /> the Taurill [[Species/Legends|species]] was in fact fully sentient.<ref name="EC">[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]</ref> On the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 13:3:14, a news story titled "Yet Another Greenputt League" was published by the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]]. It reported on the formation of the Tour and how it joined the prevously established greenputt leagues.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Non-Sentient Professional Greenputt Tour was first mentioned on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] in the [[in-universe]] issue [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #47'']], published<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 14]], [[2002]]<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref> and written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
